name: The Link
short_description: This application lets you use a webcam and a microphone to play any game with real-world movements and voice commands.
detailed_description:
Through the lens of a webcam, The Link connects you with your in-game character.

Forget treadmills and dumbbells, What if you could turn your daily workout routine into simply playing your favorite game?. Imagine the thrill of jogging through breathtaking virtual realms, from the icy landscapes of Winterspring to the dense, mysterious forests of Feralas. As you mine precious resources, battle formidable foes, and complete epic quests, your fitness journey becomes an adventure.

Visualize yourself strolling through the awe-inspiring Lands Between, casting powerful spells to vanquish the shadows that dare to cross your path.

Now, with latest computer vision technology, The Link enhances your ordinary webcam, turning it into a motion capture device. This is more than just technology—it’s your gateway to a new way of playing, of living. Simply show The Link the gestures or voice commands you want it to learn, and it will seamlessly translate your movements into in-game actions, empowering you to take control in ways you never experience before.

The most straightforward solution for motion-sensing gameplay is here, ready to elevate your gaming and your fitness to new heights. You don't need any extra hardware, competely hands free.  Step into the future with me—where every move you make in the game world brings you closer to your goals in the real world!

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
